title: Theo's Sleepy Peek-a-Boo
synopsis: Baby Theo plays peek-a-boo with his favorite bedtime friends hiding around his room before settling down for sleep.

pages.text: Where is Theo's teddy bear? Peek-a-boo! Behind the pillow!

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes sits on a cozy bed, pulling back a fluffy white pillow to reveal a brown teddy bear hiding behind it. The room has soft lighting and the teddy bear appears to be peeking out playfully.
illustration.alt: Theo discovering his teddy bear behind a pillow

pages.text: Where is bunny? Peek-a-boo! Under the blanket!

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes lifts up a corner of a soft blue blanket on his bed, revealing a white stuffed bunny rabbit hiding underneath. The bunny's ears are just visible peeking out from the blanket's edge.
illustration.alt: Theo finding his bunny under the blanket

pages.text: Where is the moon? Peek-a-boo! Behind the curtain! Time for bed, sleepy Theo.

illustration.description: Theo with short curly blonde hair, light skin, round blue eyes stands by a window, pulling back a soft yellow curtain to reveal a gentle crescent moon glowing in the dark sky. Stars twinkle around the moon, and Theo looks ready for sleep.
illustration.alt: Theo revealing the moon behind bedroom curtains

metadata.illustrationStyle: lift the flap inspired, partially hidden objects, peek-a-boo composition, hiding and revealing, interactive feel, surprise element, behind the curtain, playful concealment

questions.question: Where was Theo's teddy bear hiding?
questions.explanation: The teddy bear was hiding behind the pillow on Theo's bed!

questions.question: What did Theo find under the blanket?
questions.explanation: Theo found his bunny rabbit hiding under the soft blue blanket!

questions.question: What was behind the curtain?
questions.explanation: The beautiful crescent moon was hiding behind Theo's bedroom curtain!
